translations.de: Mein Verlobter kommt heute Abend an.
translations.pt: Meu noivo chega hoje à noite.
translations.vi: Hôn phu của tôi sẽ đến tối nay.
translations.hi: मेरे मंगेतर आज रात आ रहे हैं.
translations.ro: Logodnicul meu sosește în seara asta.
translations.ja: 私の婚約者は今夜到着します。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, masculine singular, modifying the noun 'fiancé' and agreeing in gender/number.
Common noun, masculine singular; head of the subject NP meaning 'betrothed man'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive, agreeing with 'Mon fiancé'.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'soir' to form a temporal NP.
Common noun, masculine singular; within 'ce soir', functions as a temporal modifier of the clause.

sentences.target: Je présente mon fiancé à ma mère.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pʁezɑ̃t mɔ̃ fjɑ̃se a ma mɛʁ/

translations.fr: Je présente mon fiancé à ma mère.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pʁezɑ̃t mɔ̃ fjɑ̃se a ma mɛʁ/
translations.en: I introduce my fiancé to my mother.
translations.es: Presento a mi prometido a mi madre.
translations.de: Ich stelle meiner Mutter meinen Verlobten vor.
translations.it: Presento il mio fidanzato a mia madre.
translations.zh-Hans: 我向我妈妈介绍我的未婚夫。
translations.yue: 我向我媽介紹我嘅未婚夫。
translations.ru: Я знакомлю свою маму со своим женихом.
translations.pt: Apresento meu noivo à minha mãe.
translations.he: אני מציגה את הארוס שלי לאמא שלי.
translations.vi: Tôi giới thiệu hôn phu của mình với mẹ tôi.
translations.nl: Ik stel mijn verloofde aan mijn moeder voor.
translations.uk: Я знайомлю свою маму зі своїм нареченим.
translations.hi: मैं अपनी माँ से अपने मंगेतर का परिचय कराती हूँ.
translations.el: Συστήνω τον αρραβωνιαστικό μου στη μητέρα μου.
translations.nb: Jeg introduserer min forlovede for moren min.
translations.id: Saya memperkenalkan tunangan saya kepada ibu saya.
translations.sv: Jag presenterar min fästman för min mamma.
translations.ro: Îi prezint logodnicul meu mamei mele.
translations.da: Jeg præsenterer min forlovede for min mor.
translations.ja: 母に婚約者を紹介します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the clause.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; transitive verb meaning 'to introduce/present'.
Possessive determiner, masculine singular; modifies 'fiancé' (direct object).
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'présente'.
Preposition introducing the indirect object phrase.
Possessive determiner, feminine singular; modifies 'mère'.
Common noun, feminine singular; object of the preposition 'à' (indirect object).

sentences.target: Je suis fiancé depuis deux mois.

translations.fr: Je suis fiancé depuis deux mois.
translations.en: I’ve been engaged for two months.
translations.es: Estoy comprometido desde hace dos meses.
translations.de: Ich bin seit zwei Monaten verlobt.
translations.ko: 저는 약혼한 지 두 달 되었어요.
translations.vi: Tôi đã đính hôn được hai tháng rồi.
translations.nl: Ik ben al twee maanden verloofd.
translations.hi: मैं दो महीने से मंगनीशुदा हूँ.
translations.el: Είμαι αρραβωνιασμένος εδώ και δύο μήνες.
translations.nb: Jeg har vært forlovet i to måneder.
translations.id: Saya sudah bertunangan selama dua bulan.
translations.sv: Jag har varit förlovad i två månader.
translations.da: Jeg har været forlovet i to måneder.
translations.ja: 婚約して二ヶ月になります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular; subject.
Copular auxiliary, present indicative 1st person singular; links the subject to the predicate adjective.
Adjective, masculine singular; predicative complement with 'être', indicating marital status (male form).
Preposition introducing a time span; marks duration continuing from the past up to now.
Cardinal numeral; modifies 'mois' to indicate quantity.
Common noun (invariable in number); object of 'depuis' in the measure phrase 'depuis deux mois'.

sentences.target: Elle cherche un fiancé sur une appli.
sentences.reading: /ɛl ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ fjɑ̃se syʁ yn apli/

translations.fr: Elle cherche un fiancé sur une appli.
translations.ipa: /ɛl ʃɛʁʃ œ̃ fjɑ̃se syʁ yn apli/
translations.en: She’s looking for a fiancé on an app.
translations.es: Ella busca un prometido en una aplicación.
translations.de: Sie sucht in einer App einen Verlobten.
translations.it: Lei cerca un fidanzato su un’app.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在一个应用上寻找未婚夫。
translations.pt: Ela está procurando um noivo em um aplicativo.
translations.vi: Cô ấy đang tìm hôn phu trên một ứng dụng.
translations.ar: هي تبحث عن خطيب في تطبيق.
translations.nl: Ze zoekt op een app een verloofde.
translations.hi: वह एक ऐप पर मंगेतर ढूँढ़ रही है.
translations.el: Ψάχνει για αρραβωνιαστικό σε μια εφαρμογή.
translations.nb: Hun leter etter en mann å forlove seg med i en app.
translations.id: Dia mencari tunangan di sebuah aplikasi.
translations.sv: Hon letar efter en fästman i en app.
translations.ro: Ea caută un logodnic pe o aplicație.
translations.da: Hun leder efter en mand at forlove sig med i en app.
translations.ja: 彼女はアプリで婚約者を探しています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine; subject.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive 'to look for/seek'.
Indefinite article, masculine singular; modifies 'fiancé'.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of 'cherche'.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Indefinite article, feminine singular; modifies 'appli'.
Common noun (colloquial abbreviation of 'application'); object of the preposition 'sur'.
